title: CobbleBadges [Cobblemon Addon]
description: CobbleBadges adds Badges with various effects to Cobblemon
body:
This mod adds various badges with powerful effects to Cobblemon!

**Dependencies**:

- [**Kotlin For Forge**](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) (**forge** & **NeoForge**)
- [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (**fabric** only)
- [**Cobblemon**](https://cobblemon.com/en)

If you'd like to support me, I have a [**Patreon <3**](https://www.patreon.com/harmex).

## **How to use the mod**
- You obtain **elemental type points** when **defeating pokémons** depending on **their types**.
- When **reaching** a certain **amount of points** (configurable) you **obtain** the **corresponding badge**!
- Obtaining **more points** will even **upgrade your badges**!
- Open the **Badge Case** with the keybind **Y** by default.

### Data Pack
With CobbleBadges 4, you can customize and create new badges with a data pack ([here is the wiki](https://harmex.gitbook.io/cobblebadges/)).

I also made a data pack which disables all default badges so that you can have just your own. ([available here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nocobblebadges))

<details>
<summary>Every Badge and their Effects</summary>

### Bug
- **Tier 1**:
  - +10% Jump Strength
- **Tier 2**:
  - +25% Jump Strength
  - Immunity to Decay
- **Tier 3**:
  - +50% Jump Strength
  - Immunity to Decay
  - Inflicts Decay for 10s when attacking
- **Tier 4**:
  - +100% Jump Strength
  - Immunity to Decay
  - Inflicts Decay for 10s when attacking

### Dark
- **Tier 1**:
  - +0.1 Sneaking Speed
- **Tier 2**:
  - +0.25 Sneaking Speed
  - Immunity to Blindness
  - Inflincts Blindness for 10s when attacking
- **Tier 3**:
  - +0.5 Sneaking Speed
  - Immunity to Blindness
  - Inflincts Blindness for 10s when attacking
  - Permanent Night Vision
- **Tier 4**:
  - +1 Sneaking Speed
  - Immunity to Blindness
  - Inflincts Blindness for 10s when attacking
  - Permanent Night Vision
  - Immunity to Darkness

### Dragon
- **Tier 1**:
  - +0.5 Entity Interaction Range
- **Tier 2**:
  - +1 Entity Interaction Range
- **Tier 3**:
  - +1.5 Entity Interaction Range
- **Tier 4**:
  - +2 Entity Interaction Range

### Electric
- **Tier 1**:
  - +10% Speed
- **Tier 2**:
  - +25% Speed
- **Tier 3**:
  - +50% Speed
- **Tier 4**:

### Fairy
- **Tier 1**:

- **Tier 2**:

- **Tier 3**:

- **Tier 4**:

### Fighting
- **Tier 1**:

- **Tier 2**:

- **Tier 3**:

  - +0.5 Sweeping Damage Ratio
- **Tier 4**:

### Fire
- **Tier 1**:

  - Attacking set the target on fire for 3s
- **Tier 2**:
  - -50% Burning Time
  - Attacking set the target on fire for 3s
- **Tier 3**:
  - -75% Burning Time
  - Attacking set the target on fire for 10s
- **Tier 4**:

### Flying
- **Tier 1**:

  - -25% Fall Damage Multiplier
- **Tier 2**:
  - +25% Flying Speed
  - -50% Fall Damage Multiplier
- **Tier 3**:
  - +50% Flying Speed
  - -75% Fall Damage Multiplier
- **Tier 4**:
  - +100% Flying Speed
  - -100% Fall Damage Multiplier

### Ghost
- **Tier 1**:

  - +1 Safe Fall Distance
- **Tier 2**:
  - -10% Gravity
  - +3 Safe Fall Distance
- **Tier 3**:
  - -25% Gravity
  - +6 Safe Fall Distance
- **Tier 4**:

### Grass
- **Tier 1**:

- **Tier 2**:

- **Tier 3**:

- **Tier 4**:

### Ground
- **Tier 1**:

- **Tier 2**:

- **Tier 3**:

- **Tier 4**:

### Ice
- **Tier 1**:

- **Tier 2**:

  - Ability to walk on powder snow
- **Tier 3**:
  - Immunity to Freezing
  - Ability to walk on powder snow
  - Inflicts Slowness for 10s when attacking
- **Tier 4**:
  - Immunity to Freezing
  - Ability to walk on powder snow

### Normal
- nothing

### Poison
- **Tier 1**:
  - Immunity to Poison
- **Tier 2**:
  - Immunity to Poison
- **Tier 3**:
  - Immunity to Poison
  - Immunity to Wither
- **Tier 4**:

  - Immunity to Wither

### Psychic
- **Tier 1**:
  - +0.5 Block Interaction Range
- **Tier 2**:
  - +1 Block Interaction Range
- **Tier 3**:
  - +1.5 Block Interaction Range
- **Tier 4**:
  - +2 Block Interaction Range

### Rock
- **Tier 1**:

- **Tier 2**:

- **Tier 3**:

- **Tier 4**:

### Steel
- **Tier 1**:

- **Tier 2**:
  - +2.5 Armor
  - +0.25 Explosion Knockback Resistance
- **Tier 3**:
  - +5 Armor

- **Tier 4**:

### Water
- **Tier 1**:

- **Tier 2**:

- **Tier 3**:

- **Tier 4**:

</details>
